positive: A whimsical, stylized woodland creature composition featuring a majestic fox curled around a crescent moon, set among stylized bioluminescent ferns and starry night elements. The fox has rich, warm orange and deep mahogany tones against a cool indigo and cyan background. Clean, graphic silhouette style with strong, crisp lines and moderate negative space. Use a detailed illustration aesthetic reminiscent of vintage storybook prints, focusing on flat color planes and sharp contrasts. Composition is centralized and symmetrical, designed for high visual impact on apparel. Perfect lighting suggests glowing, magical ambient light. Art by an imaginary modern fantasy illustrator.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, words, logo, watermark, signature, noise, artifact, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, asymmetrical, low contrast, muted colors
